full_text:
Chen Gui (Hanyu) 陳珪 (漢瑜)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Gui (陳珪), styledHanyu (漢瑜), was born in Xiapi. Father of Chen Deng. Served Cao Cao and Liu Bei spying on Lü Bu, then under Cao. Chen Gui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Tao Qian, Lu Bu, the Shu Kingdom, and the Wei Kingdom.
